ext.description: Lint commit messages against bundled commitlint templates (Conventional, PHP/Laravel, Node, Python). Right-click a folder or use the sidebar tree view to scaffold a config; run the CLI check on the last commit from the palette or the sidebar.
view.container.title: Commit Lint
view.templates.name: Templates
config.checkLastCommit.command: Shell command run by 'Check Last Commit Message' when preferExternal=true and a commitlint.config.* is present. Defaults to `npx --yes commitlint --from HEAD~1 --to HEAD --verbose`.
config.checkLastCommit.preferExternal: If true and a commitlint.config.* is detected in the workspace, run the external commitlint CLI in a terminal instead of the built-in validator. Default: false (use the bundled validator - no npm install required).
